recent_calls.summary: The user called to discuss issues with their AC not cooling properly and to schedule a service appointment. The agent gathered all necessary information, confirmed the details, and scheduled the appointment for June 19th. The user was satisfied with the assistance and provided positive feedback.
The user called to inquire about billing. The agent informed the user that they do not have direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

Yvonne from American Home Shield called Budget's virtual assistant Sophie to inquire about the status and diagnosis of dispatch number 497775439. Sophie informed Yvonne that she cannot provide diagnosis details directly but will forward the request to the appropriate team for follow-up. The call ended with Yvonne thanking Sophie and no further questions.
The user called and requested to speak with CG. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user called and was greeted by the agent Sophie, who confirmed the user's identity and asked how she could assist. The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further conversation. The user hung up shortly after the greeting.

The user repeatedly requested to speak with a real representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested. The call lasted 16 seconds before the transfer was completed successfully.
The user called and requested to speak with Siti. The agent attempted to connect the user to the requested person and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to confirm the appointment window for the next day, which was confirmed to be from 8 AM to 2 PM with technician Brooks. The agent also assured the user that a request for a call when the technician is on the way would be passed along. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

Pearl from American Home Shield called to confirm details about dispatch number 49563059, specifically regarding an appointment and diagnosis status. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Angel from American Home Shield called Budget to request an earlier appointment for a member, Gail Penson Walter, whose air conditioning is not working and has health concerns. The agent collected all necessary details and assured that Budget's team would contact the member directly to schedule the service as soon as possible. Angel declined additional maintenance program information and expressed satisfaction with the service.
The user requested to speak to a human agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer without further interaction.

Valerie Gary called to inquire about the status of her air conditioning service appointment and requested the earliest possible appointment. The agent was unable to find her appointment in the system and offered to transfer her to a live representative, which Valerie accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.
The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user called and requested to speak directly with a human agent. The AI agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent as requested.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.
The user called to report a missed contractor appointment scheduled for June 9th and requested assistance. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Patricia McClary called to schedule an air conditioning service under her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent collected all necessary details, including the dispatch number, service address, and user preferences, and noted an additional request for assistance with her hot water tank. The user expressed satisfaction with the calm and informative service and agreed to receive information about maintenance programs.

The user, Bob from American Home Shield customer service, called to inquire about how to pull up customer vehicle records and verify dispatch information. The agent clarified that they handle property addresses for home services and directed Bob to use the dispatch number on upgrade.frontdoor.com for verification. The agent also provided her job title for documentation purposes.

The user called to report that a contractor did not show up to fix the air conditioning at a customer's house despite an appointment being scheduled. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called but the call was disconnected after reaching voicemail, with no meaningful conversation taking place.

The user, Lairine from American Home Shield, called to get information about an appointment for customer Antoinette Doss. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to schedule air conditioning service for their home, specifically requesting an appointment for today. The agent informed the user that the earliest available appointments were on June 22nd, but the user insisted on the earliest possible opening. The call ended with the user uncertain about next steps and asking if they should hang up.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

Eman from American Home Shield called to inquire about air conditioning repair services for Roberta Bush. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

The user called and had difficulty communicating initially, mentioning they did not have a ZIP code for service. The agent attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called and requested to speak with a live agent. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to another agent successfully.
The user requested to speak with Nicole, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user requested to speak with Nicole, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user initiated a call to schedule an appointment but hung up shortly after the agent began to gather information. The call lasted only 11 seconds and ended abruptly without completing the scheduling process.
The user requested to speak with a customer representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user called Budget and was informed they needed to call back regarding parking. The agent, Sophie, attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user returned a call and the agent attempted to connect them with a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred to another agent.

The user called to inquire about setting up an appointment for AC service, mentioning that no one had contacted them yet. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Mike Klatch, called to schedule a plumbing service for a water heater replacement at his home. The agent provided available appointment slots for June 22, but the user expressed a preference for an earlier date, which was not available. The call ended without scheduling an appointment.

The user, Sheila from American Home Shield, called to inquire about the soonest availability for an AC service at a customer's location. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live representative for further help.

Anna from American Home Shield called to request an earlier appointment for an air conditioning service before the 23rd, providing all necessary details including the dispatch number and contact email. The agent confirmed the information and assured the request would be passed to the team for follow-up. Anna declined information about home maintenance programs but asked to notify the homeowner if an earlier appointment becomes available.

The user called to schedule an appointment related to heating and cooling for their home. The agent asked clarifying questions about the user's role and the issue, but the call ended abruptly before the appointment was scheduled.

The user called to make an appointment for AC cooling service through American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the service details, updated the dispatch number, and scheduled the request for this afternoon. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Jeremiah called to request immediate HVAC service for his air conditioner, which is blowing air but not cold. The agent booked an appointment for Monday, June 15th at 8 AM and informed Jeremiah about the dispatch fee and confirmation process. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback but expressing thanks.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live person, but the agent informed them that live assistance was not available at that time. The call ended shortly after without further interaction.

The user called to inquire about an earlier appointment. The agent noted the request for the earliest possible appointment and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day to confirm availability. The call ended without additional requests or instructions from the user.

Roberta called to confirm and schedule a repair for her upstairs air conditioner's broken outdoor fan blade, emphasizing the urgency due to family arriving soon. She provided detailed contact information and availability, and the agent assured her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out soon. Roberta also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

The user, Neil Steinbach, called to schedule an air conditioning service appointment for the first available slot on Thursday, June 11th. He provided details about the issue with the compressor not running, confirmed his contact information and service address, and requested a follow-up from the team to confirm the appointment. The agent collected all necessary information and assured Neil that the team would reach out the next business day.

The user called after receiving a call from the company and wanted to speak with Encomanda. The agent informed the user that it was after-hours and direct connection to Encomanda was not possible. The call ended shortly after without further resolution.

The user called to schedule an appointment for cooling service. The agent attempted to gather more details about the preferred date and time but the call ended before the user provided that information. The agent assured the user that the team would follow up the next business day to confirm the appointment.
The call was initiated but ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up without providing any information or engaging further.
